title: SwiftServe
overview: An integrated Online Service Platform designed to provide a seamless experience for shopping, delivery, and secure payments.
features: Real-time tracking from warehouse to destination
Secure payment mechanism with invoice review
challenges: Integrating three major services (shopping, delivery, and payment) into a single cohesive platform while ensuring a high-quality user experience and secure transactions.
outcome: A fully functional web application that adheres to the MVC design pattern, ensuring maintainability and a clean separation of concerns.
